input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.3.3
            TITLE: the motor scatter shield must be:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.3.3: The Motor Scatter Shield must be:
T.5.3.3 The Motor Scatter Shield must be: 
• Made from aluminum alloy 6061-T6 or steel 
• Minimum thickness:  1.0 mm

final_answer: The Motor Scatter Shield must be: T.5.3.3 The Motor Scatter Shield must be: • Made from aluminum alloy 6061-T6 or steel • Minimum thickness: 1.0 mm
